summary: Completed testing of CastleAdmin driver username and password configuration feature. Backend APIs are fully functional, frontend loads correctly but has session management issues preventing complete UI testing.

integration_issues.issue: Session management issues causing redirects to login page during testing

passed_tests: All 3 backend API endpoints accessible (/admin-api/admin/create-driver-user, reset-driver-password, remove-driver-user)
API validation working correctly (missing fields, password length)
Driver list displays correctly with multiple drivers
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate session management issues that prevent consistent access to driver profile details and Portal Login Credentials section during testing. The core functionality appears to be implemented correctly based on code review and backend API testing.
